subcodes.first_line: We have manifested whatsoever is befitting for the Cause of God in His days, to which every discerning and fair-minded soul doth bear witness. All things have spoken forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اظهرنا ما ینبغی لامر الله فی ایامه یشهد بذالک کل منصف بصیر قد نطق کلشیء
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
